title: pseudoselago pulchra
intro: Pseudoselago pulchra, also known as the "blue mountain-silverbush" or "blue mountain selago", is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in South Africa for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pseudoselago pulchra include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
